About Us
Congrats go out to Dr Andrew and the team at Carney Animal Hospital for being named “Best Veterinarian” by Baltimore Style Magazine in 2021!
Welcome to Carney Animal Hospital where we make healthy pets and happy parents our numbers one focus. Dr. Andrew Jendrek DVM welcomes you to join our happy family at Carney Animal Hospital.
We know your pets are members of your family and deserve the best treatment avaible. We’re a full service Veterinary Hospital that covers:
Vaccinations
Spays and Neuters
Check Ups and Wellness Checks
Dental Health
& Much More!
When you are searching for an animal hospital in Baltimore, MD you need one that can take care of everything your pet needs to live a happy and healthy life. Carney Animal Hospital is the trustworthy veterinarian clinic for every check-up, vaccination, or procedure.
Contact Info
9011 Harford Rd
Parkville, MD 21234
Phone:
(410) 665-5255
Email:

Office Hours

Wed, Thu: 8am - 6pm
Sat: 8am - 1pm
Sun: Closed
Closed on the following days:
Christmas, New years, Memorial Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, Labor day

general.text: Dental problems in animals can lead to diseases, and we strive to prevent this by providing excellent dental care services.
general.excerpt: Dental problems in animals can lead to diseases, and we strive to prevent this by providing excellent dental care services.

general.text: We employ state-of-the-art tools and procedures, ensuring a pain-free experience for your beloved pets.
general.excerpt: We employ state-of-the-art tools and procedures, ensuring a pain-free experience for your beloved pets.

general.text: We would love to meet you and your pet and give them the highest quality treatment.
general.excerpt: We would love to meet you and your pet and give them the highest quality treatment.

general.text: Equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and cutting-edge equipment, our veterinary clinic ensures the highest quality of care for your beloved pets.
general.excerpt: Equipped with state-of-the-art facilities and cutting-edge equipment, our veterinary clinic ensures the highest quality of care for your beloved pets.

general.text: Contact Carney Animal Hospital today and schedule an appointment with our experienced and compassionate team.
general.excerpt: Contact Carney Animal Hospital today and schedule an appointment with our experienced and compassionate team.

general.text: Christmas, New years, Memorial Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, Labor day
general.excerpt: Christmas, New years, Memorial Day, Fourth of July, Thanksgiving, Labor day

general.text: Our knowledgeable staff can help your family learn about potty training your pup, performing nail trims on your puppy or kitten, dietary recommendations, and potential health hazards for your new pet.
general.excerpt: Our knowledgeable staff can help your family learn about potty training your pup, performing nail trims on your puppy or kitten, dietary recommendations, and potential health hazards for your new pet.

general.text: Annual age-appropriate lab tests, testing for heartworm and/or tick-borne diseases, and fecal tests for parasites may also be recommended for your pet.
general.excerpt: Annual age-appropriate lab tests, testing for heartworm and/or tick-borne diseases, and fecal tests for parasites may also be recommended for your pet.

general.text: For this reason, we recommend twice-yearly veterinary visits for pets over 7 years of age.
general.excerpt: For this reason, we recommend twice-yearly veterinary visits for pets over 7 years of age.

general.text: Your veterinarian can recommend diet modification and supplements to help improve your older pet’s mental sharpness.
general.excerpt: Your veterinarian can recommend diet modification and supplements to help improve your older pet’s mental sharpness.

general.text: In the early stages of dental disease, your veterinarian can recommend home dental health care measures such as tooth brushing, dental treats and rinses, and dental diets.
general.excerpt: In the early stages of dental disease, your veterinarian can recommend home dental health care measures such as tooth brushing, dental treats and rinses, and dental diets.

general.text: Upon discharge, the veterinary team will review any instructions pertaining to post-dental medications, special feeding instructions, and when to resume home dental care.
general.excerpt: Upon discharge, the veterinary team will review any instructions pertaining to post-dental medications, special feeding instructions, and when to resume home dental care.

dogs.text: Our knowledgeable staff can help your family learn about potty training your pup, performing nail trims on your puppy or kitten, dietary recommendations, and potential health hazards for your new pet.
dogs.excerpt: Our knowledgeable staff can help your family learn about potty training your pup, performing nail trims on your puppy or kitten, dietary recommendations, and potential health hazards for your new pet.

cats.text: Our knowledgeable staff can help your family learn about potty training your pup, performing nail trims on your puppy or kitten, dietary recommendations, and potential health hazards for your new pet.
cats.excerpt: Our knowledgeable staff can help your family learn about potty training your pup, performing nail trims on your puppy or kitten, dietary recommendations, and potential health hazards for your new pet.

cats.text: Your veterinarian can recommend diet modification and supplements to help improve your older pet’s mental sharpness.
cats.excerpt: Your veterinarian can recommend diet modification and supplements to help improve your older pet’s mental sharpness.

cats.text: Upon discharge, the veterinary team will review any instructions pertaining to post-dental medications, special feeding instructions, and when to resume home dental care.
cats.excerpt: Upon discharge, the veterinary team will review any instructions pertaining to post-dental medications, special feeding instructions, and when to resume home dental care.

cats.text: When there is liver or kidney disease, this may affect the choices of anesthetic drugs recommended by your veterinarian, to prevent anesthetic complications and promote a smooth anesthetic recovery.
cats.excerpt: When there is liver or kidney disease, this may affect the choices of anesthetic drugs recommended by your veterinarian, to prevent anesthetic complications and promote a smooth anesthetic recovery.

small_animals.text: Any pre-surgical testing that is recommended — Baseline laboratory testing is beneficial so that there are no surprises on surgery day.
small_animals.excerpt: Any pre-surgical testing that is recommended — Baseline laboratory testing is beneficial so that there are no surprises on surgery day.

small_animals.text: As your pet is stabilized, your veterinarian will review a diagnostic plan which may include imaging (radiographs, ultrasound) and laboratory evaluation (blood and/or urine tests) to ascertain the severity of the situation and tailor treatment for your pet.
